title: LoaderComplex
description: A very simple mod that aims to be compatible with almost every mod/plugin loader
body:
This mod is a Proof of Concept! LoaderComplex is a mod all about compatibility, taken to the extreme! this mod is/will be compatible with any modloader you find for Minecraft, note that i didn't say "Minecraft: Java Edition", just "Minecraft", because you guessed, Bedrock is a platform with loaders too, so this mod will target them too.

LC can load addons too! The api is located at `com.enderzombi102:loadercomplex-api:0.1.3` in the `https://repsy.io/mvn/enderzombi102/mc` repo

From beta 1.7.3 to release 1.18.2, whats your choice?
